description: This was a game I played again in the asr league against a 4k.  they played a good game considering it was no handicap.  This problem came about in the game. in the game I killed black, but there is a way for black to find life. I actually put this problem up for white to kill, but then someone made it clear to me that black can live. Many thanks. Let me know if you find any new variations from the ones I have, please. Enjoy!
